narrative:
New Franklin 3-A (precinct in Summit County) has 918 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a clear Republican lean of 7.6 percentage points.
